description: This file defines negation in the Future Perfect tense in Njo Viri (Balanda). Future perfect negation expresses actions that will not have been completed by a future time.

general_principle.structure: Future perfect negation in Balanda is formed by retaining the future prefix 'le-' and the completion marker 'dheki', and adding the negation marker 'gba' sentence-finally.

negation_structure.notes: Used to express that an action will not have been completed in the future. | The future prefix 'le-' must attach to the verb base; The verb must remain in base form; The completion marker 'dheki' must be retained; The negation marker 'gba' must appear sentence-final

tense_and_aspect_distinction.structure: Future perfect negation encodes future tense and non-completion.
tense_and_aspect_distinction.notes: 'le-' encodes future tense; 'dheki' encodes completion (negated by 'gba')

word_order_rules.notes: Subject; le-Verb; Object / Complement; dheki; gba

error_constraints.structure: Do not omit 'le-'; Do not omit 'dheki'; Do not use the progressive prefix 'ti-'; Do not use the copula 'ma'; Do not move 'gba' from sentence-final position; Do not use past markers

model_behavior_guidelines.structure: {"enforce_le_prefix": true, "enforce_base_verb": true, "require_dheki": true, "require_sentence_final_gba": true, "block_other_tense_aspect_markers": true, "map_to_english_future_perfect_negation": true}

output: I will not have eaten fish
She will not have drunk water

input: Danda leteli muru famvara dheki gba
output: We will not have slept on the bed
Uku will not have gone
Ngande will not have come home

input: Ndi lenonö gbi difo dheki gba
output: They will not have walked in the compound
She will not have run fast

input: Uku lemande gbi njü dheki gba
output: Uku will not have worked in the garden

input: Wiki lemoliki gbi difo dheki gba
output: The child will not have played in the compound
I will not have watched the dog

input: Ne levele njo balanda dheki gba
output: I will not have spoken Balanda
The girl will not have written words
I will not have read a book
He will not have thought about it
They will not have known it
I will not have asked them

input: Ngande levele zi ndi dheki gba
output: Ngande will not have told them

input: Wilii lekeye ti naa ni dheki gba
output: The girl will not have called her mother
I will not have loved you

input: Ni lemaguku ti kpörö dheki gba
output: He will not have feared the snake
She will not have hated him
Ngande will not have surprised him
He will not have seemed calm
The girl will not have tied the shoe
He will not have cut the pot
I will not have pulled the door
We will not have pushed the box
The girl will not have washed the shoe
I will not have hidden the beads
Ngande will not have built a house
I will not have created words
She will not have changed the words
I will not have turned the door
We will not have added money
I will not have described Balanda
They will not have helped the poor
Ngande will not have initiated the project
I will not have contributed to the project
The girl will not have separated trash
We will not have upheld the law
I will not have wanted water
She will not have given money
I will not have found money
Uku will not have tried the cloth
Ngande will not have left home
I will not have arrived in Wau
He will not have sharpened the knife
Ngande will not have imitated adults
We will not have started the project
He will not have fallen
